California Trip — Mountain Lodging

Family of 7 · Aug 10–12, 2026 (2 nights) · prices are whole-stay, fees included, pre-tax (≈ +13% all-in) · cap $800 / $400-night

🏆
Arnold wins on space-per-dollar.
A sleeps-10 cabin with everyone in a real bed runs $434 — less than the cheapest no-squeeze place in either Tahoe search. Trade-off: ~50 mi to the Tahoe day trip, but 5 min to Big Trees.
💲 green = ≤$500 · amber = $500–650 · gray = $650+✅ real beds = everyone sleeps in a bed⚠️ = needs air mattress / couch🪜 bunk room🎮 game room♨️ hot tub🕹️(−) arcade = scored as a minus
🌲 Arnold / Hwy-4 432 found · 224 fit · best value + closest to Big Trees
